overview: A football tournament management platform where organizers can create tournaments in league, knockout, or hybrid formats, manage teams and players, edit live match scores, and display professional standings and fixtures — all styled like Premier League and La Liga.
features: Create tournaments with league, knockout, or hybrid formats
Manage teams and player rosters with positions and jersey numbers
Live score editing with automatic standings recalculation
Professional standings table with points, goals, and goal difference
Fixture schedule with upcoming and completed matches
Fully responsive design for mobile and desktop
